match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: Natural cinematic realism with tactile editorial energy, SCARLETT wearing casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts, her fingers twisting the base of the lipstick from (CORAL_LIPSTICK) as the coral bullet rises slowly catching a sharp shaft of morning light that throws a pink reflection across her knuckles, intimate white vanity room with smooth white tabletop and small round mirror visible in soft background, bright natural window light cutting dramatically across surfaces creating crisp directional highlights and gentle shadows, shallow depth of field emphasizing skin texture light interaction and material details, eye-level close-up macro framing tightly on the hands and extending bullet

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 3 [LOCATION REF]: INT. VANITY ROOM - MORNING - Small intimate vanity space with a white tabletop vanity table and a small round mirror
    - Image 4 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - Slim elegant lipstick tube with smooth cylindrical metallic casing in soft coral-pink finish
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
